channel.title: Europe on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Europe on Share Hub

item.title: Working and Living in Luxembourg: Europe's Best Kept Secret?
item.description:
Working & Living in Luxembourg: Europe’s Best Kept Secret?
#

Free public transport. Low taxes. A country where half the population are immigrants. Here’s the full picture.

Luxembourg doesn’t come up often in conversations about where to move in Europe. It should.

I had a job interview there. I researched the country seriously. And while I ultimately chose Germany, what I found in Luxembourg surprised me — both the advantages and the very real challenges.

item.title: Working and Living in the Netherlands: What I Learned Before Moving
item.description:
Working & Living in the Netherlands: What I Learned Before Moving
#

I applied for jobs there, got a sponsorship offer, and researched everything. Here’s what nobody tells you.

The Netherlands was my first serious target when I decided to move abroad. I spent months researching, applied to companies, and got far enough in the process to receive a sponsorship offer. I didn’t end up moving there — but I learned an enormous amount along the way.

item.title: Switzerland Zurich Travel Guide | Things to Do, Transport & Budget (2024)
item.description: Zurich, Switzerland’s financial capital, is one of the world’s most expensive cities. But with the right planning, it’s possible to see the city’s best places without burning through your wallet.
